repo.title: GitHub - chakra-ui/chakra-ui: Chakra UI is a component system for building SaaS products with speed ⚡️ · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Chakra UI
manifest_entry.focus: composable design tokens and layout primitives
avoid: building everything from generic boxes with no visual point of view
confusing flexible primitives with finished product design
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: Helpful for learning how token systems and component ergonomics fit together.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: A flexible system is strongest when layout discipline stays tighter than the API surface.
